articles.title: Celtics reportedly plan to work out UConn basketball star ahead of NBA Draft
articles.description:
Alex Karaban’s pre-draft workout for Boston reportedly will take place next week.

The post Celtics reportedly plan to work out UConn basketball star ahead of NBA Draft appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics will conduct a pre-draft workout for UConn star Alex Karaban next week.
Karaban is a key prospect as the Celtics prepare for the upcoming NBA Draft.
Local fans may see increased excitement for the Celtics' future with potential new talent.
